---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a focused improvement for the NEXURA public site or operational infrastructure
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""

---

## Problem or opportunity

Describe the operational, content, design, workflow, or deployment problem this would improve.

## Proposed change

Describe the smallest clear change that would solve it.

## Affected area

- [ ] Public website
- [ ] AI estimate flow
- [ ] Cloudflare Pages deployment
- [ ] Pages Function / API
- [ ] GitHub workflow
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Alternatives considered

List any simpler or lower-risk options.

## Additional context

Do not include credentials, private client data, personal addresses, or secrets.
